message:
test(grpc): add verification tests for compression metadata and interceptor propagation

Add GRPC-VERIFY-049 and GRPC-VERIFY-050 tests:

- 049: verify channel compression configuration is surfaced in request
  metadata — grpc-encoding and grpc-accept-encoding headers are emitted
  when send_compression and accept_compressions are configured
- 050: verify MetadataInterceptor propagates custom headers into unary
  calls and that the interceptor chain composes correctly with
  compression settings

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
